reviews.review_title: Amazingly Fun but a few bugs
reviews.review_description: I really love this game and speed through all the clown levels every day but my trophy’s keep falling off of the shelf on trophy island and it’s really annoying I have to pick them up every time I finish a level please fix this also o can’t find out how to get the itsy bitsy achievement and my completionist  mindset is really bugging me

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, Gz35293! This review had us laughing 😄 We love that you’re speedrunning the clown levels daily. That’s some serious dedication.

Also, huge respect for the completionist mindset… we feel that pain 😅 The itsy bitsy achievement is definitely one of those sneaky ones 👀 It only requires picking up 5 spiders, so you may have run into a bug (pun intended) that we’ll definitely look into.

Sorry about the trophies taking a dive off the shelf, that’s not the experience we want for you at all. Really appreciate you calling that out.

If you want, come jump into our Discord and we can help you track down that achievement and keep you updated: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

Or feel free to email us at hello@happymanic.com

Thanks again for the 5 stars and for being part of the chaos 🏆🎪

reviews.review_description: Reality breach does not work it just puts you into a elevator like play with no elevator the game is great but I don't know if it is game problem or mine

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the 5 stars, 1980svr! We’re really glad you’re enjoying the game overall 🙌

Sorry to hear you’re running into that issue with Reality Breach. That definitely doesn’t sound like the intended experience, and we’d love to help you figure out what’s going on.

If you can, please reach out to us at hello@happymanic.com or join our Discord so we can troubleshoot with you directly: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

It would really help to know which headset you’re using, your Meta Horizon OS version, and a bit about your play space so we can narrow it down.

Thanks again for calling it out and for the support. We’ll do our best to get you fully into the experience! 💙

reviews.review_description: Great game over all, but having trouble in the update. I tried to play the reality breach that they added, but when it comes time for me to shoot the targets right after the balloons, they're just not there. I'm very dissappointed bc I was so excited to try it, but I can't shoot something that's not there. I've gone in and out again 3 times already just today and I'm about to try again, but if it doesn't work this time, I don't know what I'll do. Hope it works one day. 😔

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the 5-star review, kenstifa24, and for taking the time to explain what’s happening. We’re really sorry about the frustration you’re running into with the Reality Breach challenge, especially after how excited you were to try it. We totally understand how disappointing that feels, and we want to help get this sorted out for you as quickly as possible.

If you’re willing, could you email us at hello@happymanic.com with a few details so we can investigate properly? Let us know which headset you’re using, whether it’s Quest 2, Quest 3, or Quest 3S. It would also help to know which Meta Horizon OS version you’re currently on and roughly how large the physical space is where you’re playing the Reality Breach challenge.

Thank you again for your patience and for supporting the game. We really appreciate you, and we’ll do our best to help make sure you can enjoy that challenge the way it’s meant to be experienced. 💙

reviews.review_description:
Great Well-Made Game With Some Hidden Lore And Secrets, Definitely A Must-Play! But Please Add Thalassophobia Levels! I Dont Even Have The Phobia But I Still Wanna Experience Some Cool Undersea Nope Challenges. I Know A Lot Of People With This Phobia, So It Might Be A Big Hit!

( Keep Up The Great Work, 
And Stay Hydrated! 🌊🦈 )

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, Captain.Sharky! We love the energy of this review 😄🤡🕷️

It’s awesome to hear that you enjoyed the hidden lore and secrets. We put a lot of care into those little details, so it’s great knowing players are discovering them. And the idea of a thalassophobia challenge is definitely a terrifyingly cool concept. The deep ocean has a way of making even people without the phobia feel uneasy 👀🌊

Thanks again for the 5 stars, the great suggestion, and the reminder to stay hydrated. We’ll do our best! 🦈

If you ever want to share more ideas or chat with the community, join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

Or reach out anytime at hello@happymanic.com

reviews.review_description: Love this game best scary game in a while and dioko scared the crap out of me

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, verdejo2015! We’re really glad you’re loving the game 🙌

And Dioko getting you like that… yeah, you’re definitely not alone 😅 That moment has caught a lot of people off guard.

We truly appreciate the 5 stars and the support. It means a lot to the team.

If you ever want to share more moments or connect with the community, join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

Or reach out anytime at hello@happymanic.com

reviews.review_description: I would  rather have a Brock dropped on my head 1000 times

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback, MATTYMC67. We’re sorry to hear the experience didn’t land for you.

We’re always working to improve and would genuinely appreciate any specific details about what didn’t work, whether it was gameplay, performance, or something else.

If you’re open to sharing more, feel free to reach out to us at hello@happymanic.com We’re always listening.

reviews.review_description: Its not to hard for me or easy i really like what they did with the game but i wish you could save the coconut more than once and they should add tight spaces and a night shift at the clowns building and the fear of sharks also the fear of the dark

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, dumd348! We really appreciate the 5 stars and the thoughtful feedback. 🙌

We’re glad the difficulty feels just right for you and that you’re enjoying what we built. That balance is super important to us. And saving the coconut more than once… we see you 👀🥥

Those are some awesome ideas too. Tight spaces, a night shift at the clown building, sharks, fear of the dark… you’re basically building a whole new set of nightmares 😄 We love the creativity.

If you ever want to share more ideas or chat with other players, join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

Or reach out anytime at hello@happymanic.com

reviews.review_description:
There are 3 fear types (fear of Clowns; fear of Spiders; fear of heights) and 3 difficulties on each type. There is also 1 MR mode, which makes 10 Levels. You have also 4 environments, where you can stay. You can also review your Achievements in game.
Would recommend

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, TheGuy_bbbbb! Calling it PEAK is high praise and we truly appreciate it 🙌

We love that you broke everything down so clearly too. Three fear types, multiple difficulties, mixed reality mode, different environments, achievements to track your progress...you really explored it all. That means a lot!

Thank you for the recommendation and the 5 stars. Support like this helps more players discover the experience.

If you ever want to share strategies or connect with other players, join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

Or reach out anytime at hello@happymanic.com

reviews.review_description: this has to be one of the best ever horror games that actually let you leave instead of just having to manly leave i love all the characters like mister pilley and mister coconout and it's just a great game i wish there was more levels though because i would have been in great but i love the new virtual reality thing were the clowns are actually in your house and that's just really fun and this is a really great game so whoever wants a game or they let you leave or or any kind of game with funny characters this is the game

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, Ferryscary125! This review made us smile big time. We love that you noticed being able to actually leave instead of feeling trapped. That was such an intentional part of the experience, so hearing that it stood out to you is awesome.

And Mr Peels and Coco would be very proud right now 😄 We’re so glad you’re enjoying the characters and the mixed reality moments with the clowns in your house. That blend of funny and terrifying is exactly the energy we were going for.

We appreciate the feedback about wanting more levels too. It means a lot that you’d want to keep playing longer. Thank you for the 5 stars and for recommending the game to others. That kind of support truly helps us grow.

If you ever want to share more ideas or hang with the community, join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

Or reach out anytime at hello@happymanic.com
 💌

reviews.review_description: Oh wow this game was absolotley amazing I didnt think I had any of these fears but the clown portians was scary asf so much fun My only problem with the game is its a little to short but now that the price has been reduced you get what you pay for for 10 bucks its a really good purchase even if you dont have any of these fesrs. 1 thing I do recommened changing is the jumpscare animations and  "you died" specifically on phils rampage because I did kind of find them underwhelming but other than that this game is a 10/10 definetly worth a try I got this game on sale for 5 bucks so it was worth it

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, CertifiedTacoMuncher1! We're pumped you had such a great time with the game and really appreciate the detailed 5-star review. It's always wild when people discover fears they didn’t even know they had, clown portions included 😅 We're glad you found it fun, scary, and worth the price, especially on sale!

Totally hear you on the feedback about Phil’s rampage and the jumpscare animations. That kind of input helps us understand what hits and what could hit harder. Thanks for keeping it real.

If you ever want to talk more about your experience or drop more ideas, come hang with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

Or reach out anytime at hello@happymanic.com 💌

We’re grateful you gave it a try and shared your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: Can’t say I like anything about the game. Visually horrible and not scary in the slightest also I can’t understand the positivity. If you’re looking for actally scary play dreadhalls or cosmosdread not this trash.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your honest opinion, mattaishred. We understand that horror is very subjective and not every experience connects with every player.

We’ve seen a wide range of reactions from players, and that diversity of response is part of what makes the genre interesting.

Nope Challenge was designed around real-world phobias and focused fear scenarios rather than procedurally generated dungeon crawling. We’re fans of many styles of horror ourselves, and our goal here was to create specific, immersive fear moments centered on things like heights, clowns, spiders, and other phobia-driven elements.

We appreciate you giving it a try and taking the time to leave feedback.

If you ever want to share more specific thoughts, you can reach us at hello@happymanic.com

reviews.review_description: Love how this game knows when to be funny and when to be scary!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, cappello4! We love hearing that 🙌

That balance between funny and scary is exactly what we were aiming for, so it’s awesome to know it’s hitting right for you. Really appreciate the 5 stars and the love!

If you ever want to connect with the community or share your favorite moments, join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

Or reach out anytime at hello@happymanic.com

It worked I was just dumb

reviews.review_title: Brilliant to watch people play it.
reviews.review_description: Just had my boys on the hardest climbing level. No spoilers but he was screaming on there. Was worth getting it for just that.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, Youthio! That is amazing to hear 😄 Watching someone take on the hardest climbing level is an experience all by itself. The screaming, the panic, the “don’t look down” moments… absolutely priceless.

Let’s just say that "features" were designed to take your mind off the height for a second. Whether that makes it better or way worse… we’ll let you decide 👀🕷️

We’re so glad it created a fun memory for you and your boys. That’s exactly what we hope for.

If you ever want to share clips or hang with the community, come join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

Or reach out anytime at hello@happymanic.com
 💌

reviews.review_description:
This game was a small but really fun game with my fear of spiders the third level was really scary for me all of em jumping on me and stuff I did have one problem though the NOPE button isn't really consistent at all with it pressing I have to try over and over to get it to 3. 

-Updated response this game after I had my one issue with this game it took two days for them to update and fix the problem I also loved the elements they took from the fnaf help wanted parts and service mini games those things I love about small gsmdxy

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for updating your review and for previously pointing out that issue with the NOPE button. We really appreciate it when players call out things like that. It helps us catch and fix problems fast. We wanted to get that update out right away so everyone could have a smoother experience. Glad you’re enjoying the game and those FNAF-inspired moments!

Thanks so much for the 4-star review, Def_Not_Will! We hear your excitement loud and clear. Co-op and more fears would definitely take things to the next level, and we agree it would be awesome. We're super glad you're enjoying the game overall, and that passion means a lot to us.

reviews.review_description: I love this game so much I enjoyed it a lot. It had a lot more content than I was expecting it to. But no game is perfect, this game will scare the crap out of you and if you aren't up for this challenge then don't get it! Also message to the devs please add thallasophobia!!!!!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the positive review! It is great to hear that you dug into the content and found more in the game than you expected. Reactions like yours are exactly why the NOPE system exists. People push deep into the challenges, hit their fear limits, and still come back for more.

Thalassophobia is a popular request. We have done work in that direction, but we branched off a bit into the mixed reality development to focus on delivering the new Reality Breach mixed reality challenge we recently added. We are now back in development of various things, and we look forward to sharing soon what is next.

If you want to stay involved or give more input, you can join us on Discord at https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8 or email us at hello@happymanic.com

developer_response.body: Wow! thank you, marchitelli7! 🎉 We're so glad you're having a blast! 🙌 The fact that you completely reconnected it means the world to us. That’s the kind of energy we love to see. Thanks for the 5 stars and for being part of the fun!

reviews.review_description: I played this a LONG time ago had not played it For awhile but i found it sitting in my Library I think it was my 2nd VR game i THINK but yeah i love this game So scary i like the Heights Part Because I'm Not scared HAHA you thought you scare me out of Heights.  But i will try to go through the SPOOKY clown part yes my Headset is broken Rn cuz Spooky game i fling my Headset off once. LOL (it's Broken Getting fixed Currently)

developer_response.body:
That's a fantastic story and honestly one we can relate to! During early development, we had multiple playtesters yank their headsets off in pure panic. Some even broke them before we added the NOPE button. It's a totally natural fight, flight, or freeze reaction, and the NOPE button was designed exactly to give you back some control in those wild moments.

Glad to hear you're brave with heights! If you make it through the clown challenges, definitely let us know. Those have been the undoing of many fearless players.

Feel free to join us on Discord https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8
 or reach out at hello@happymanic.com if you want to share more or need help getting through any part once that headset's fixed!

Uhh. We’re blushing. 🙂 Appreciate the 5 stars... whoever you are. That might be the most unique review we’ve seen yet.

Thanks for the support. If you ever want to share more thoughts, feel free to hop on Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

or email us at hello@happymanic.com

reviews.review_description:
He keeps disappearing when i get to the top of the ladder and i can’t put him in his favorite chair. At the relexing beach he leaves your hand out of nowhere and he won’t go in his seat and i have restarted several times and it does the same thing everytime 
￼

developer_response.body:
10/25/2025 Update! We updated the game and removed the requirement to complete the tutorial. This means you can now jump into the rest of the game and enjoy the full experience while we continue working on a proper fix for the tutorial bug.

If this update has improved your experience, we’d be incredibly grateful if you’d consider updating your review. As a small indie team, 1-star ratings can significantly impact our visibility and our ability to keep improving the game. We genuinely appreciate your support and the time you took to share your feedback.

If you'd like to stay in the loop or share anything else, we’d love to see you over on our Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8
 or reach out anytime at hello@happymanic.com

---- Previous Response on 10/24/2025 ----

I'm really sorry you ran into this issue with Mr. Peels. That definitely shouldn’t be happening, and I understand how frustrating it must be, especially right at the start of the game. This is the first I'm hearing of this bug occurring so consistently, and I'd love to work with you directly to gather more details and resolve it quickly.

If you're willing, please reach out to hello@happymanic.com
 or join us on Discord at https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8
. Any information you can provide, like your headset model or OS version, would be a massive help as the issue is investigated. We just rolled out an update yesterday, and there may be something we missed.

Thanks again for flagging this. Mr. Peels deserves his favorite chair, and we’re on it.

reviews.review_description: see it would be good but you just gotta add more things to do

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! To understand your comment better, it would help to know how far you made it in the current content. The game includes nine distinct VR challenges for clowns, spiders, and heights, each built as its own experience rather than simple difficulty swaps. We have a lot of data showing that players often NOPE OUT because the intensity of these challenges pushes them past their personal fear thresholds. The moderate and extreme spider challenges have triggered heartbeat monitors, the extreme heights challenge has caused people to really scream at events, and the clown challenges can become overwhelming for many players.

The new 10th Mixed Reality challenge has also been received well, especially because of how quickly it escalates and the variety of weapons and encounters it introduces.

If you can share which challenges you played and completed, it will help us understand whether you felt the existing content was not enough or if something else felt missing for you. This detail really helps us! You can reach us on Discord at https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8 or by email at hello@happymanic.com

reviews.review_description: The game is good, but where are the updates that were promised last year? We're nearly at the end of 2025 and still no new modes. The game really isn't worth the asking price at the moment.

developer_response.body:
1/26/2026 - Hey VinnieValentine2006! Just checking to see if you noticed that we have been listening. Not only did we drop the price down to $9.99 from $19.99, but we also added more content. I hope this reflects well on your review rating of the game! ;)

11/4/2025 - Hey VinnieValentine2006! Just an update that we released more content last week. It is another experience we hope you enjoy. Thanks again for your feedback!
----

10/19/2025 - Thanks for your feedback...totally understandable. The wait has been longer than we hoped, but we do have good news. Right now, members of our community are actively testing the next update, and you’re absolutely welcome to join them. Just hop into our Discord at https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8.

This upcoming release is planned to launch before Halloween (which is in 2 weeks from this response), and we think it brings something really special to the table. Thanks again for sticking with us. We appreciate it more than you know.

reviews.review_description: Fun

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, GalacticPorcupine5825! We’re really glad you’re having fun with the game. The 5 stars mean a lot to our team. 😄

If you ever want to share your favorite moments or connect with other players, come join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

Or reach out anytime at hello@happymanic.com

reviews.review_description: I have been playing the game for a while now with friends and family. It's great with the different levels of comfort which also work for different ability levels. Easy to understand the challenges and although not things I am scared of it's still good fun to play again and again. Looking forward to hopefully seeing some other fears added in the future, maybe claustrophobia or aquaphobia!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for this amazing review! We’re thrilled to hear it’s been such a hit with friends and family. That kind of shared, party-style experience is exactly what NOPE CHALLENGE was built for. Even if the phobias aren’t your own, it’s always fun to watch others brave their fears.

Feel free to reach out anytime with thoughts or ideas. We love hearing from the community and would love to have you join us on Discord (https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8) or by email (hello@happymanic.com). Also, we’ve been working on a mixed reality experience that we plan to release soon. It’s been a fun experiment for us and adds a whole new layer to the gameplay. Keep an eye out!

reviews.review_description:
I thought it was going to be just jump scares, etc. but the game actually gives you tools to be courageous and continue in the experience, at least with the first two levels of spiders and clowns. Thinking I’m only scared of heights , I found out that I can tolerate spiders (but I still didn’t try the highest level 🤭) however there is something scary about clowns 🤣
I only tried the first height challenge and I didn’t finish it yet - and I was sitting down, I want to try it standing up!
In my original review I mentioned a bug which happened during my first play and the game makers were very interested to know more about it, which I think is great!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review, and sorry about that issue with Mr. Peels and the audio loop. We’ve had a few reports of it and are actively investigating. It seems tied to some of the newer Meta OS updates. A restart usually clears it, but we’re working on a proper fix.

Also, just to clarify: there are 9 unique challenges across Heights, Spiders, and Clowns, broken up into unique Light, Moderate, and Extreme variants. Definitely more than two!

If you can, let us know what headset you’re using (Quest 2, Quest 3, etc.) and your OS version, that helps us a lot. You can reach us at hello@happymanic.com or on our Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8. Thanks again!

reviews.review_description: Good job guys

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, Caio123456789! We really appreciate you taking the time to leave a 5-star review. That simple “Good job guys” means a lot to the whole team. 🙌

We’re glad you’re enjoying the game and being part of the community.

If you ever want to share ideas or connect with other players, join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

Or reach out anytime at hello@happymanic.com
 💌

reviews.review_description: Please add Korean.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the 5-star review and for asking about Korean language support! 💛

You're not alone. Several players have requested it, and it's clear this title has really resonated with players in Korea and other countries. We absolutely understand how important language access is. As a small indie team, our resources are limited right now, but this is something we care about deeply and truly hope to make possible in the future.

Your feedback helps us prioritize and grow, so thank you again. Every voice matters, and yours brings us one step closer to making this a reality. 🙏

reviews.review_title: Great game dioko is so scary
reviews.review_description: I love the features of the nope button the breather spaces and mr peels and the coconut but I do think it could use a few more levels please release the new levels I've been waiting since Q4 2024 and it's 2025. Keep up the awesome work I can't wait for thalasaphobia

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the awesome review! We're thrilled to hear Dioko got to you (he’s intense), and it’s great to know you're enjoying the NOPE button, breather spaces, and our tropical duo, Mr. Peels and the coconut.

You're absolutely right...we know it’s been a wait since Q4 2024. We hit some technical and funding speed bumps after launch that slowed development, but the enthusiasm from players like you is what keeps us going. Thalassophobia is definitely still something we want to bring to life, and we appreciate your patience and support more than you know. 

If you haven’t already, join us on Discord to stay updated and share your ideas: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8.

reviews.review_description:
It’s great but I found a bug where yk the checkpoints they break on the hard level climbing heights if you fall and jump far off you will spawn at the start area and if you 
jump over the fence you will teleport almost at the end if you need more I can make vid for it

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the 5-star review, and we’re really glad you’re enjoying the game! And ugh, yes, we’re aware of that bug and sorry you ran into it. It’s tied to how save data is stored, and some of the Meta OS updates have caused issues we’re actively working to fix.

If you’re willing to share a video or more details, we’d appreciate it a ton. You can post in our Discord (https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8) or email us directly at hello@happymanic.com. Thanks again for the kind words and support!

reviews.review_description: Really good game, you should add the fear of the deep ocean !

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much, kittyy_VR! We're thrilled you’re enjoying the game. The fear of the deep ocean is such a cool idea, and something we have been looking at... eerie, immersive, and full of potential. Definitely love where your head's at.

If you’ve got more ideas or want to chat with the community, join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

Or email us anytime at hello@happymanic.com
 💌

We appreciate the 5 stars and your creativity!

reviews.review_description: Game was fun the first time playing through and scary, but after it started getting less fun. I would recommend for a large group of friends.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the 5-star review! We're really glad you had a fun and scary first experience...that's exactly the kind of reaction we hoped to create. NOPE CHALLENGE definitely shines in group settings, and it’s awesome to hear you're recommending it for that.

If you have any thoughts on how we can keep things feeling fresh after that first playthrough, feel free to share. You can join us on Discord at:

https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

Or reach us via email at: hello@happymanic.com 

We'd love to hear your ideas!

reviews.review_description: Face theme

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the 5 stars! Short but powerful...sounds like you dove right into the heart of what NOPE CHALLENGE is all about. Stay tuned, as we have some mixed reality content coming out soon. If you ever want to share more about your favorite challenge or what you'd love to see next, come say hi on our Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8
 or shoot us an email at hello@happymanic.com

reviews.review_description: cool but fun game plays add MORE level like under water or night makes everything is cool frombluecheesy123

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much, bluecheesy123! Really glad you’re enjoying the game!
We actually started exploring some underwater (thellassophobia-inspired) content a while back, but paused to focus on Mixed Reality development. It’s definitely something we’re looking to revisit for future challenges.

If you have more ideas or feedback, we’d love to hear from you in our Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8 or by email at hello@happymanic.com

Thanks again for playing NOPE CHALLENGE!

reviews.review_description: Cool

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much, Smit773.2023! We're glad you’re loving it. Cool players like you make it all worth it 😎🎮

Come hang with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

Or reach out anytime at hello@happymanic.com

reviews.review_description: im scared of hights now thank you nope challenge

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the awesome review, FriendlyFalcon4865! we’ll take that as a win (and maybe a tiny apology 😅).

NOPE CHALLENGE is all about unlocking new fears you didn’t know you had...sounds like Heights hit the mark!

If you ever want to share ideas or connect with others who’ve also discovered surprise phobias, feel free to join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8 or email us at hello@happymanic.com

Thanks again for playing!

reviews.review_description: Im not scared of clows now

developer_response.body: Not scared of clowns anymore? We’ll let the marionettes, spiders, and snakes know. Thanks for the 5 stars!

reviews.review_title: Lots of fun for me and the kids!
reviews.review_description: My kids love this game and I love watching them have a fun! Neither of them has made it in the clowns house yet! My son is a rock climber and he enjoys all the climbing elements to this game too.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! We’re thrilled to hear your family is enjoying NOPE CHALLENGE together. The climbing elements were designed to be both fun and physically engaging, so it’s awesome to hear your son (especially as a rock climber!) is enjoying that aspect. As for the clown challenges… they have proven to be the most exciting and challenging for many players! Tell them the NOPE Button is always there if they need it, and they can bond with Mr Peels in the Breather Space. :)

We’d love to hear more from you or your kids in our Discord community: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8. Thanks again for the support!

reviews.review_description:
If you're really particularly scared of heights or spiders maybe this might be exciting, maybe even scary? If you're actually into scary games (resident evil, metro awakening, into the radius, etc) then this is very very tame. 

The graphics are alright and the controls are fine. Neither great nor bad.

I regret not trying it before the window to return it. Hopefully I will have some friends who find it interesting

developer_response.body:
Thanks for giving NOPE CHALLENGE a try and for taking the time to share your thoughts. The game isn’t meant to compete with combat-heavy horror like Resident Evil or Metro. It focuses on phobia-based fear, the kind that builds tension through discomfort and anticipation rather than monsters or weapons.

That said, fear is personal. Some players breeze through, while others end up sweating through their shirts or getting heart-rate warnings from their wearables. That range of reactions is exactly what makes it interesting for us to study and refine.

We appreciate you giving it a go, and if you or your friends have feedback after trying the more extreme levels, we’d love to hear it on Discord (https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8) or at hello@happymanic.com.

Also, stay tuned...we have a new Mixed Reality experience coming very soon, currently being tested with help from our community. It brings a whole new level of immersion and intensity to the world of NOPE CHALLENGE.

reviews.review_description: It's really good and spooky it's underrated  but it need new updates the idea is you need to add scary robots almost like fnaf and you need to add Natural disasters it will be awesome

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the awesome review! We're thrilled you enjoyed the spooky vibe and really appreciate the suggestions...scary robots and natural disasters are both killer ideas. We’ve definitely had FNAF-style tension on our minds, and it’s great to hear that’s something you’d want more of.

We’d love for you to share more ideas like that on our Discord too: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8. Your feedback means a lot!

reviews.review_description: Game started off working well but on the first height climb it isn’t tracking hand movements properly so it’s not playable. Will be seeking a refund.

developer_response.body:
We’re really sorry to hear you had this issue, and we absolutely want to get to the bottom of it. At the moment, we're not seeing the same behavior on our side, but it’s possible this could be related to the specific headset or OS version being used.

If you’re willing, could you let us know what headset you're using (Quest 2, Quest 3, Quest 3s, etc.) and which OS version is installed? That would help us immensely in narrowing down the cause. We know this is a big ask, but 1-star reviews have a significant impact on the game, and we want to fix this as quickly as possible for you and others who might be affected.

Feel free to reach out directly at hello@happymanic.com or hop on our Discord (https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8) if that’s easier. Thanks again for flagging this, and we hope to make things right.

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this game, it's really fun, but it can be a bit glitchy at times and minus my phobia of spiders, it isn't exactly the longest game and that's fine for a indie game at a good price, would recommend to others trying to get into vr

developer_response.body: Thank you for the 4 stars and for sharing your experience! We're glad to hear you're having fun with the game overall. We definitely hear you on the glitches and appreciate you mentioning it, We want to make things as smooth as possible. And thank you for recognizing the balance we're aiming for as an indie team. If you ever run into any specific glitches you'd like to report, feel free to reach out to us through Discord (https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8) or by email at hello@happymanic.com. Your feedback really helps us as we keep refining the game!

reviews.review_description: Looks good fun. But hate clowns !!!

developer_response.body:
Glad you’re enjoying it though we totally get the clown hesitation! You're not alone there. Interestingly, even though many players say clowns don't scare them, the clown challenges are actually among the most intense and most enjoyed in the entire game.

If you ever brave Clowns Extreme, let us know how it goes, or if you hit that NOPE button fast! 😄 And feel free to join our Discord (https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8) if you want to connect with others dodging Dioko too.

reviews.review_description:
Great fun. Enjoying the heights .Great exercise for the

 arms.. screaming at the spiders...yikes.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the great review! We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the heights...and yes, that arm workout is real! Screaming at the spiders is a rite of passage in NOPE CHALLENGE. 😄

If you have more thoughts or want to share your favorite moments, feel free to hop into our Discord (https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8). We love hearing how players are experiencing the game!

reviews.review_description: During the extreme spider level when you get bit you get holes on your hands. You could make it look more glory and more realistic like it's actually real or just make a hole level about umm holes😐

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the 5 stars and for catching that detail, you’ve got a sharp eye! What you’re referring to is trypophobia, and you're absolutely right: those hand effects do appear after a bite from any spider, but we agree they’re a bit too subtle right now.

You’d be surprised how many players have noticed and totally freaked out. It’s one of those phobias that hits hard for some and not at all for others, making it an interesting one to design around.

A full-on “hole level” is definitely something we’ve talked about. Thanks again for the suggestion, and if you’ve got more ideas, feel free to drop by the Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8 👀

reviews.review_description: Really (!) wanted to like this game! Immense issues with positioning… try to place something in the teranium and the whole thing moves. Teleport to a board and you show up halfway in the board and fall again. Have reconfigured all to no avail. What a shame. Will come back to it in a few months… maybe an update by then….

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing this, and we’re really sorry to hear about the issues you ran into, especially since you were excited to play. What you described with the terrarium and teleporting sounds unusual and hasn’t been widely reported, so we’d love to dig into this with you. When you mention the whole thing moving, do you mean the terrarium objects or the environment itself? And with the teleporting, was it happening with a specific board or multiple?

If you're willing, we'd really appreciate it if you could reach out to us via email (hello@happymanic.com) or join our Discord (https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8) so we can troubleshoot and try to replicate what you're experiencing.

Thanks again for the feedback. We hope we can smooth things out and give you a better experience next time you jump in.

reviews.review_description:
Probably great for somebody who just started VR but like I beat it in 1 session, not a long one either

3rd intensity clown one was pretty great, if the game went all in on that but harder with less hiding spots it would be top tier

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review and for pushing through to Clowns Extreme. That’s easily the most intense challenge in the game, and it’s awesome to hear it stood out. We’ve seen similar feedback where people say, “Start with the clown tone, crank it up, and don’t let up,” and honestly… we love that energy.

We built NOPE CHALLENGE to scale across a wide range of fear thresholds and VR experience levels, which can make some challenges feel lighter to seasoned players. If you’ve got more thoughts like the “less hiding spots” idea, we’re all ears. Come share in the Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

Appreciate you giving it a run and hope you keep an eye out for what’s next.

reviews.review_title: ONE OF THE BEST VR HORROR EXPERIENCES
reviews.review_description: This game made me terrified and scared but somehow it was still thrilling! Especially the clown ones but when I beat it I wanted MORE. So here’s a fun idea MAKE A LEVEL ON AQUAPHOBIA. I wish I could play more and I am excited on future updates

developer_response.body:
Glad to hear NOPE CHALLENGE hit the right mix of fear and thrill for you! Clowns definitely have a way of getting under people’s skin, and it’s awesome that you pushed through and wanted more. Aquaphobia is a great idea, and let’s just say… you might want to stay tuned. 👀

If you haven’t already, join us on Discord (https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8) to chat more with the community and see what’s next! Thanks for the 5 stars and for being part of this wild ride!

reviews.review_description: I was so scared of the big spider at the climbing tower and the last level of arachnophobia was so scary but I beat it I haven’t done the clown one but it seems so scary.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the awesome review, and congrats on conquering that climbing tower spider! You're definitely not alone... that one gets people sprinting up those walls 😅

Funny enough, even though many players say clowns aren’t their biggest fear, our data shows those challenges are actually some of the most intense (and most enjoyed!) in the game. If you do build up the courage to face Phil and Dioko, just remember, the NOPE button is always there for you. 😈🎪

And if you want to swap stories or hear how others handled it, we’d love to have you on our Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

Thanks again for playing!

reviews.review_description: ￼The movement was perfect love it👍

developer_response.body: Glad to hear the movement felt just right. We worked hard to make sure it felt smooth and immersive. Thanks for the 5 stars and the kind words! If you ever have feedback or ideas, swing by our Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8 👊 We would also be curious to know if you used either the teleport movement or default smooth movement.

reviews.review_description: It was okay but not what i expected . Only the spider one is somewhat scary and there’s only 3 different fears you can choose. (clowns,spiders,heights)

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the honest review. We totally understand that expectations vary, and it sounds like the experience didn’t quite align with what you were hoping for. While the game focuses on clowns, spiders, and heights as the core phobias, each challenge is designed with additional layered triggers, from cockroaches and darkness to confinement, lightning, and even subtle environmental fears, to offer more variety than initially apparent.

We’d love to know more about what kind of fears or intensity levels you were expecting. That type of insight helps us better understand how players engage with the content. You’re always welcome to join the conversation over on our Discord (https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8) or reach out at hello@happymanic.com.

reviews.review_description: This game got me hard it’s fun scary and just fun everyone should buy this title fire 🔥 it’s worth it

developer_response.body: Glad you’re enjoying NOPE CHALLENGE, and huge thanks for the 🔥🔥🔥 review! We love hearing that the game delivered both the scares and the fun. If you’ve got favorite moments or ideas for phobias you’d like to see in the future, come hang out with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8. Appreciate the support! 💪

reviews.review_title: Kids laughed, wife was brave, I screamed
reviews.review_description: Had to write this. This game got us all. Was surprised and it was hilarious. The kids laughed while playing and then got a real kick out of watching us play. Wife is afraid of a lot of stuff but she was the most brave. Nope button thing gave her courage. Me? I will admit that I went in all macho and then screamed A LOT. I did calm down by talkin to the banana on that island. I have never sweated so much by just standing still and my watch kept going off due to my heart rate. That was nuts!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing such an amazing review! It made our day! We love hearing how the game brought your whole family together for some laughs, bravery, and yes, even screams. It sounds like your wife really embraced the spirit of the game, and we’re glad the NOPE Button helped her push through.

As for you… well, we’re pretty sure Mr. Peels is proud of how you handled it. Your description of sweating while standing still and your watch going off due to your heart rate is exactly the kind of immersive experience we hoped to create.

Thanks again for playing, and we hope your family keeps having fun with the game. If you haven’t already, join our Discord (https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8) to share your stories or get updates on what’s coming next!

reviews.review_description:
I bought this game a few days ago.
I downloaded it an hour ago.
This game sucks!
No clear instructions.
I’m stuck in a room for 15 minutes, loading boxes on a conveyor belt, with no other options or instructions.
No spiders.
NOTHING!
Return my freaking money!

developer_response.body:
We're sorry to hear about your experience. The scenario you described doesn’t specifically match the 3 unique spider challenges in game, but we definitely want to help figure out what is going on. There are absolutely spiders in those challenges. A LOT of spiders, but we have been methodical about how they are presented to players in each challenge based on the intensity chosen.

The LIGHT spider challenge has a short conveyor that brings items to you with step-by-step audio instructions to gradually introduce you and tell you what to do with the items it sends out. This is ideal for those sensitive to spiders. The MODERATE spider challenge also starts briefly with another short conveyor that sends items out to you and includes step-by-step instructions before getting much more intense, and we've seen a high level of NOPE button use in this challenge. The EXTREME spider challenge has no conveyors but throws you directly into the chaos with brief audio instructions—without paying attention to those instructions, it’s easy to get overwhelmed and likely die very quickly. This level has one of the highest rates of fight, flight, freeze and NOPE button usage in the game based on the data we have been collecting.

Please reach out to us at hello@happymanic.com or join our Discord (https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8) so we can better understand your issue and assist you directly.

reviews.review_title: Great game. Solid on all aspects.
reviews.review_description: For the size of the team that made this, it's truly a work of art. Let's be honest there are not many quest games that are OMG amazing but to say the day it came out and had no control issues great graphics and a fun factor  I can say this game is solid. And for the low price how can anyone complain.

developer_response.body: I am relaying this to the team and we really appreciate it! We are quite tiny but we do our best and we love the feedback that is coming in. This is just the start for us and this type of review is rocket fuel! Thank you!

reviews.review_description: As a person with a passion for psychology in real life, I really wanted to like this game. I really enjoy the concept of playing to phobias. Unfortunately, there's just not much game here to be had. There are three different phobias with three increasing levels of difficulty, for a total of 9 experiences as of this review. My favorite experience was the moderate height challenge, which takes place in an Aztec temple. As far as fear, I think the third and final clown challenge was the closest I got to being truly scared, mostly because it was somewhat difficult to evade the killer clown. Otherwise, I breezed through all 9 challenges within about 2 hours. I also felt like the breather areas could have more to do. Overall, I am interested in seeing what additional phobias they add to the game. I didn't have any game-breaking bugs in my playthrough. So the main issue, in my opinion, is just a lack of content compared to what I felt that I had paid. Especially when compared to other horror titles on the platform.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your honest review! We're glad you enjoyed the concept and found parts of the game like the Aztec temple memorable. We get your point about wanting more content—adding new challenges is definitely on our agenda.

It's great to hear that the clown challenge gave you a good scare and that you didn't run into any bugs (the technical ones of course) in the game. We're taking notes on your thoughts about the breather areas and overall game length. This is just the beginning, so more to explore and more phobia related content to conquer are part of our plan, so we hope to keep you engaged and excited about what’s coming.

Thanks again for your feedback! It really helps us improve. Keep an eye on updates, and we'd love to hear more of your thoughts as we grow. Feel free to reach out on Discord https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8 or at hello@happymanic.com at anytime!

reviews.review_description:
This game is quite new but exceeds the horror limit! I found this game very enjoyable. Once you complete an extreme level and go back to the breather space you feel relived. Love the heights but the only problem is on the extreme why a huge spider, i got more scared of the spider than the heights, the clown mini games are fun but the extreme is very scary like mentioned and finally the spider one is beyond fun, its very creepy! On the levels of the spider one, don’t try and hit the spider, I warn you. 

Overall, an amazing game and has a lot of potential!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the stellar review and for sharing your experience with NOPE CHALLENGE! We're thrilled to hear that you've enjoyed the game's thrills and chills. Regarding the spider in the extreme heights level—your reaction is exactly what we hoped for! By introducing the spider, we aimed to challenge those who might not find heights as terrifying, adding an extra layer of fear to push you to climb higher. It's all about mixing fears to enhance the overall intensity and keep you on your toes. We appreciate your feedback on the clown mini-games and the spider levels as well. Keep pushing those limits, and remember, there's always the NOPE Button if it gets too intense!

Stay tuned for more updates and challenges. We have lots of ideas in the pipeline to continue expanding the game's world. And if you have more thoughts or want to connect with other players, join us on our Discord at https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8 or drop us a line at hello@happymanic.com. Thanks again for your support and for pushing through those fears!

reviews.review_description: This game was good, and the levels were scary but there was not enough content. Maybe the developers of the game could add more levels at a future date other than that, great game. 🏢 🤡 🕷️

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review! We're glad you enjoyed the game and appreciate your feedback on wanting more content. We're always considering how to expand and enhance the game experience.

Stay connected for future updates by joining our Discord at https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8, and feel free to share any more thoughts at hello@happymanic.com. Your input helps us improve!

reviews.review_description: This game is perfect but the only problem is I just wish there was more levels, but everything else is really good

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the 5-star review! We're glad to hear you're enjoying the game. We hear you on wanting more levels, and we're working on bringing more content your way. Stay tuned for updates and join us on Discord (https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8) to share more ideas and keep up with the latest news.

Thanks again for your support! 😊

reviews.review_description: This game is really good but they need to add more playable phobias like claustrophobia and stuff like that bc there’s only nine levels and 3 phobias.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the four stars and for sharing your thoughts! Adding more variety is definitely on our radar as we plan for future content. We’re always looking to enrich the game experience, and player suggestions like yours are super helpful in guiding those decisions.

Appreciate you playing and taking the time to let us know what you think!

reviews.review_description: I felt sick and not in a good way     it's when you turn right and left   there's a low latency.    I  would normally  refund but my grandchild will probably like it    . The movment in it is terrible  and I can play games like contractors for hours without being sick   .

developer_response.body:
UPDATE!  We've just released a patch that includes improved snap turn responsiveness and introduces teleport movement as an option. There are also additional adjustments available in the in-game configuration menu that might enhance your experience. We hope these updates make the game more enjoyable for both you and your grandchild. Please give the new features a try, and feel free to share your feedback with us at hello@happymanic.com.

https://www.oculus.com/experiences/quest/developer-post/901097858452496/

----
This is great feedback and something we are very sensitive to and will be looking at in great detail. We have an update coming very soon that adds teleport as a traversal option for players. We thoroughly tested all aspects of turning and movement but there are always rooms for improvement, especially with comfort settings. Can you tell us if it was the Quest 2, Quest 3 or Quest Pro? Feel free to email us at hello@happymanic.com

reviews.review_description: I enjoy it very much

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the 5-star review! We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying NOPE CHALLENGE. If you have any more feedback or ideas, feel free to join us on Discord at https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8

reviews.review_description: I love the mechanics of Phil and Dioko so much that I forgot I was wearing a headset. I also like the fact of the breathing space and Mr Peeles (wish Arnold could be there too) I have an idea of a new phobia, how about there are dolls/puppets that only move when you look away from you while the building is on fire.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the 5-star review! We're thrilled to hear you love the mechanics of Phil and Dioko. Mr. Peels is definitely a fan favorite, and keep a lookout for our updates. He may soon have a buddy to hang out with. ;)

Your idea for a new phobia with dolls/puppets that move when you look away while the building is on fire is an interesting concept. The combination of pediophobia and pyrophobia would definitely ramp up the intensity. We'll consider it as we continue to expand NOPE CHALLENGE.

Join our Discord (https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8) to share more of your thoughts and ideas. We'd love to hear more from you!

Thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_description: just bought and played the Nope game---wow wow wow wow----seriously very good- one of the best---pls just try it- bloody wow wow

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you so much for your incredible enthusiasm! 😍 We're absolutely thrilled to hear you loved playing NOPE CHALLENGE and appreciate your recommendation. It's players like you who make all the hard work worth it. If you have any favorite moments or suggestions, we'd love to hear from you at hello@happymanic.com. Keep enjoying the game and stay tuned for more exciting updates!

reviews.review_description:
I scared of clowns 🥲 
Probably Phil,thank you so much for responding to my comment creators,Now that I have your attention can you add the the phobia of deep water. My friend will get it if that becomes one of the phobias

developer_response.body: Which one scared you the most? Phil, the blind robot clown or Dioko who can see all? Did Mary scare you as well?

reviews.review_description: I only just got this game, and I already love it. The controls are perfect, the mechanics are perfect, almost everything is perfect. My only complaint is that there aren’t very much levels. You should defiantly make more phobias, as a lot of people would definitely play them. I would recommend this games to anybody who has fears or likes horror. I gave this 5 stars because i see a lot of potential in this game

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the awesome review and the 5 stars! We're thrilled to hear you're loving NOPE CHALLENGE and appreciate your kind words about the controls and mechanics.

We hear you on wanting more levels! We're always exploring new ideas for phobias to add and ways to expand the game to keep it fresh and exciting. Your suggestion is right on track with our plans, and knowing there’s a demand makes it even more exciting for us.

Thanks for recommending us and for seeing the potential in NOPE CHALLENGE. Keep an eye out for updates, as we've got some exciting things in the pipeline. We have only just begun! If you have any specific phobias you’d love to see, or other suggestions, feel free to drop us a line at hello@happymanic.com. Your input helps us make the game even better!

reviews.review_description: I liked the clowns and heights but spiders felt cheaper than the other two for me. I feel like there should be more challenges for the price point, hopefully some free content in the future. I admit the clowns got me a couple of times,I jumped,lol. The heights was fun but did not like the spiders. I really ish it was longer. I don’t feel there’s two hours of experience here. Not trying to be so negative here,I wanted this to be amazing, but it’s lacking content. I still had fun but just wish there was more. Good job on the clowns and heights though.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for your honest feedback! We truly value it as it guides our improvements. It’s great to hear you enjoyed the clowns and heights, but it’s a bummer the spiders didn’t hit the mark for you. Interestingly, the spider challenges have seen the most use of the NOPE button, which isn’t too surprising given how common arachnophobia is! The impact really does vary based on personal fears.

We’re gearing up for some updates, including a 'quality of life' patch that’ll iron out a few kinks and add a teleport option to help out those who need it.

NOPE CHALLENGE packs a concise tutorial, 9 unique phobia challenges with some MODERATE and EXTREME ones featuring our dynamic AI clowns and spiders for endless replayability, and then some of the heights challenges with time-based objectives to keep you coming back to beat your best scores. And don’t miss out on the Breather Space—it’s got 4 islands designed for relaxation, loads of achievements, and hidden computer chips throughout the game for extra discovery. We're committed to enhancing the game continuously, especially those spider sections. If you have any specific suggestions or new features you’d like to see, please email us at hello@happymanic.com. We’re all ears and eager to make NOPE CHALLENGE as amazing as possible!

reviews.review_description: Good game but needs more content

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great rating and feedback! We're always working on bringing more exciting content to NOPE CHALLENGE. Keep an eye out for updates, and feel free to join our Discord to stay informed and share more of what you'd love to see! https://discord.gg/AuGu7J6nq8
